purpose: Execute one school patch bridge: select topic, plan 1000 patch, build Codex task, run/record Codex, validate-normalize candidates, optionally absorb, and update runtime ledger.

executor_modes.DryRun: select topic, plan patch, build Codex task, stop before Codex
executor_modes.MockCodex: generate validator-safe mock candidates, validate-normalize, no absorption by default
executor_modes.RunCodex: run Codex CLI with generated task; record CODEX_FAILED or CODEX_DRAFT_CREATED

memory_progress_rule: Only ledger_state=ABSORBED counts as memory update. VALIDATED_NORMALIZED is not memory progress.
boundary: Validation used MockCodex without absorption; active memory was not mutated. Real Codex and absorption are next live-test slice.
